# VolCop

> VolCop builds volunteer management software for law enforcement and government agencies. VolSmart is its flagship platform for rosters, scheduling, training, fleet, hours, and dispatch.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of VolCop and VolSmart.
- [VolSmart Product](/product): The flagship platform — features, demo, and walkthrough.
- [Features](/features): Every workflow inside VolSmart — roster, scheduling, training, fleet, hours, dispatch.
- [About](/about): Story, values, and the team behind VolCop.
- [Request a Demo](/demo): Schedule a guided walkthrough with the VolCop team.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with VolCop sales and partnerships.
- [Volunteer Portal](/copsmart): VolSmart volunteer operations terminal overview.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How VolCop handles volunteer program information.
